docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-11-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM SERVED JAN-11-2011, CERTIFIED OR REGISTERED MAIL - OUT OF STATE AS TO DEFENDANT DUNAWAY, MATTHEW A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNAWAY, MATTHEW A. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $310.68 INTEREST, $211.15 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,321.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-11-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM AS TO DEFENDANT DUNAWAY, MATTHEW A. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-2011
